hero.title: TRT Protocol Starter Kit
hero.subtitle: Evidence-Based Hormone Optimization
hero.description: Stop guessing. Start optimizing. Get the exact protocols used by advanced TRT users.

module1.title: Injection Frequency Calculator
module1.description: Interactive Excel tool. Input your total weekly dose, get precise per-injection dosing for any frequency (EOD, E3.5D, weekly). Includes stability charts.

module2.title: Bloodwork Interpretation Guide (20 pages)
module2.description: Decode your labs like a pro. Total T vs Free T, SHBG analysis, E2 management, optimal ranges (not just 'normal'). Know exactly what your numbers mean.

module3.title: AI Dosing Protocols (15 pages)
module3.description: Arimidex vs Aromasin: half-lives, dosing schedules, when to use (and when NOT to). Prevent high E2 without crashing it. Science-backed protocols.

module4.title: Weekly Optimization Checklist
module4.description: Track injections, symptoms, bloodwork timing. Stay dialed in. PDF printable or digital.

hero.title: About WeightWise Health
hero.subtitle: Democratizing access to evidence-based hormone optimization

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: WeightWise Health was created to fill a critical gap in hormone optimization education. Too many people rely on outdated clinic protocols, broscience from forums, or incomplete information that leads to suboptimal results.
mission.paragraph2: We believe everyone deserves access to the same evidence-based protocols that advanced users and clinicians use—without the gatekeeping, without the upsells, and without the BS.
mission.paragraph3: Our approach is simple: distill the latest research, clinical experience, and real-world results into actionable protocols you can use today. Whether you're optimizing testosterone, exploring peptides, or managing weight with GLP-1s, we provide the roadmap.

point1.title: Evidence-Based
point1.description: Every protocol backed by research. No broscience, no anecdotes presented as facts. Just data.

point2.title: No Gatekeeping
point2.description: Information should be accessible. We don't hide protocols behind expensive consults or memberships.

point3.title: Real Protocols
point3.description: Actual dosages, frequencies, and management strategies. Not vague advice. Actionable information.

cta.title: Ready to Optimize?
cta.description: Get the complete TRT protocol system used by thousands.
